/CAL: APD MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/X: FOR REASONS AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD, THE BALANCE OF FORMAL  PROBATION IS CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION/PROB EXP: 05-10-22/X: PROBATION EXPIRATION DATE REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/DAWT/X:COUNSEL PROVIDES DOCTOR'SNOTE TO COURT INDICATING THAT PATIENT WILL BE UNABLE TO PERFORM PHYSICAL ACTIVITY FROM  06-26-17 THROUGH 08-01-17,/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST SIGN UP FOR SWAP NO LATER THAN 08-25-17/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT SWAP MAY BE TRANSFERRED TO NEVADA COUNTY, IF NOT APPROVED, HOWEVER, DEFENDANT WILL HAVE TO COMPLETE IN SAN FRANCISCO,/ /X:NO FUTURE APPEARANCES REQUIRED UNLESS BY REQUEST OF EITHER PARTY,/

/CAL: SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 20D /CTS:1 /SWAPD: JUNE 30, 2017/X: SWAP TO BE COMPLETED IN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/X: COURT DOES NOT OBJECT TO THE DEFENSE' INTENTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION TO NEVADA COUNTY, IN THESTATE OF CALIFORNIA/PF460 12/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1 YEAR/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/RESTV/CTORD: NEVADA COUNTYPROBATION DEPARTMENT MAY DETERMINE RESTITUTION AFTER PROBATION ISSUCCESSFULLY TRANSFERRED/CITE/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/
/CAL: CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ADPRS1: VC 23152 (B) ON08-06-15 IN THE COUNTY OF CONTRA COSTA/
/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
